sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78264" key="parakro/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακρό-ᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n78264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disobedience</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg001.perseus-grc1:18:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
